articles.title: Iran using children in security roles in war, reports and witnesses say
articles.summary: An 11-year-old is reported to have been killed in an air strike while manning a checkpoint in Tehran.

articles.summary: Defence Minister Israel Katz also says houses in Lebanese villages near the Israeli border will be demolished.
